subcodes.first_line: God, His angels and His Messengers bear witness that there is no God but Him, and that He Who speaketh amongst the nations is, verily, the Desired One of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله و ملائکته و رسله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق بین الامم انه هو مقصود العالم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
